title: devesanter Pants Hangers Non Slip Space Saving Trousers Hangers Stainless Steel Clothes Hangers Closet Space Saving for Pants Jeans Scarf Hanging （3 Pack ） Grey
features: ✔Space saving pants hangers -- 4 tier pants hangers. Each hanger can at least hold up 4 jeans, trousers or other clothing. Maximize to save your closet space and keep it clean and orderly. Strong bearing strength and won't be easy to be out of shape

✔Easy to Use- Each hanger can be hanged for 4 trousers/ ties at same time. Save the space in your closet that offer you more space to storage some other things. Don't worry about the distortion of the pants rack, always durable and keep a good shape as its premium quality

✔The unique design is suitable for any clothes-the smooth surface has a tail at the end of the hanger to prevent the clothes from falling off the hanger. Suitable for all kinds of clothes. It is very suitable for hanging your jeans, trousers, trousers, ties, scarves, etc., making it compact and organized. Keep your pants neat and orderly on the pole. You will like being able to hang more pants and save space.

✔Sturdy & Durable Organizer Hangers -- Each open jean hangers made of heavy duty chrome metal with sturdy construction for lasting use. We enlarge the welding point area to made each bar supporting heavy jeans or Denim without any hassle
✔SATISFACTION - If you have any question about the product you received, please let us know without hesitation. We would try our best to help you and improve your purchasing experiences.
description: Product Description · You can hang four pants with one, and it is thin and not bulky with a thickness of only 0.5 cm, and you can efficiently store slacks and trousers. Increases storage capacity within a limited space. · The soft material is gentle on clothes and prevents clothes from slipping. · The rounded design makes it hard to fold and wrinkles, and the open-end design makes it easy to use · Using a sturdy iron material, it has a firm and hard finish, and it is OK to wear heavy clothing such as denim. ·A high-quality hanger that is rust-resistant and chrome-plated for a long time. Space Saver Each hanger can be hanged for 4 trousers at same time. Save the space in your closet that offer you more space to storage some other things. Super Strong Made of Stainless Steel which makes the pants hangers good quality with high hardness, Easy to Use Open hanging design don't worry about the distortion of the pants rack, always durable and keep a good shape as its premium quality. Any Clothes is Suitable Compatible with all kinds of clothes. Perfect for hang your jeans, pants, trousers, ties, scarf, etc. That make it compact and organized. SPECIFICATION: * Name: Pants Hangers * Design: 4-layers * Material: Stainless Steel * Color: Grey * Weight: 220 g PACKAGE INCLUDES: 3 * Pants Hangers FEATURES: * Made of Premium Stainless Steel. Durable and not easy to be out of shape. * Perfect for apartment, house, dorms, bathroom etc. * Compatible for pants/ clothes/ towel/ sweatpants/ scarf/ trousers/ slacks/ ties etc. * Unique Design, convenient you to hang and remove slacks quickly and efficiently. Saves lots of space in your closet. * Non-slip caps on the ends which look and feel very secure and should not fall off.
